message:
fix(test): fix compilation errors in proptest_error_renderer, proptest_format, proptest_table

- Fix private module imports: use re-exported paths from output::
- Add EffectiveFormat, Style, colors to output mod.rs re-exports
- Replace Just(X) with prop_map for non-Clone error types (WeztermError, PatternError, WorkflowError)
- Replace arb_table_plain/json strategies with arb_table_parts + build_table to avoid Table not implementing Debug
- Fix .to_string() on regex literals (String is not a Strategy)
- Fix borrow-of-moved-value in prop_assert_eq! (Rust 2024 edition)
- Fix type annotation for closure parameter
- Fix test 19 to handle missing catalog entries (FT-9004, FT-9005)

All 105 tests pass (35 per file).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
